name: Slurm output-log fixture evidence
summary: Use public-safe job-record and filesystem snippets to check missing-output-log triage.

fixtures.description: Synthetic scontrol job record with stdout, stderr, command, and working directory.
Synthetic filesystem evidence for missing stdout and empty stderr.

checks.label: Job record fixture includes log paths and workdir
Filesystem fixture captures missing and empty log states

expected_outcomes: The skill should inspect scheduler log paths, working directory, and filesystem state before blaming Slurm.
The skill should route existing but empty logs toward job-state and application-startup review.
